meta.analyst_note: 本次新增三款競品萃取資料（B0G3CY83L5、B0DLPL7LC5、B0DNV3NV61），執行完整跨產品比較分析。

Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Prismatic Evolutions ETB
Magic: The Gathering Aetherdrift Play Booster Box

meta.research_note: 研究報告（trading-cards--2026-02-06.md）自評為 MAJOR RESEARCH GAP，WebSearch/WebFetch 量不足，但本次已有4款產品的 L1-L6 萃取資料，可進行直接比較。

cannot_solve_problem.label: 無法解決問題（功能失效）

issues.description: 促銷 Pikachu 卡彎曲、包裝被打開、缺少 Booster Pack，收藏功能完全失效
issues.representative_quote: Uno de los paquetes venia abierto, le falta un booster y otro viene abierto, y la carta de pikachu viene dañada

issues.description: 第三方賣家售價 $38.90 超過 Target MSRP $18.00 達 116%，黃牛溢價明顯
issues.representative_quote: Only $18 at Target,,,, Scalpers have a lot of nerve.

issues.description: 買家收到德語版而非英語版
issues.representative_quote: Irreführendes Bild. Ich dachte ich hätte die englische Version bestellt... Leider kam die deutsche Version.

issues.description: 外盒運輸受損，對 sealed collector 影響嚴重；多數情況下內部卡片完好
issues.representative_quote: Product came damaged; Came in beat up and torn.

issues.description: 少數訂單配送延遲
issues.representative_quote: Demorou muito para entregar, chegou pós o prazo umas 2x

cannot_solve_problem.label: 無法解決問題（功能失效）

issues.description: 約 1/8 買家收到已被拆封重新密封的盒子，卡牌和促銷卡遭竊，疑似退貨品重新上架，核心開包體驗完全失效
issues.representative_quote: Resealed dont waste your money; Product came damaged and cards and promos taken out; It was already opened with the plastic being removed. A scam

issues.description: 促銷卡 N's Zekrom 遺失，宣傳內容物不符
issues.representative_quote: Missing promo cards in ETB!; The package also did not include the advertised promo card

issues.description: 售價遠超 MSRP，買家認為定價剝奪一般消費者購買機會
issues.representative_quote: Over double msrp. Children should be able to enjoy the pokemon tcg hobby, not be up charged and priced out

issues.description: Amazon 以塑膠袋或紙袋運送 ETB，導致盒體凹陷折損
issues.representative_quote: Ships in a paper bag. Will arrive completely beat up; Came creased and teared, never seen a ETB be creased like a pair of old shoes

cannot_solve_problem.label: 無法解決問題（功能失效）

issues.description: 【極嚴重】近半數買家收到被拆封重新密封的盒子，為所有分析產品中最高篡改率。屬於產品完整性危機。
issues.representative_quote: Box was opened and re-sealed; all foil packs were opened and many cards were missing. Unfortunately this has been happening with Pokemon cards regardless of who they come from.

issues.description: 個別 Booster Pack 被打開，高價值稀有卡和閃卡被抽走
issues.representative_quote: all the packs were open and all of the holes and rares and anything else was taken out and replaced with Lorcana cards

issues.description: 獨家全藝術 Eevee 促銷卡在篡改後遺失
issues.representative_quote: Came without the Eevee promo card meaning the entire package was resealed. Packs too.

issues.description: 買家收到少於宣傳的 9 包 Booster Pack
issues.representative_quote: my son opened this and there was only 7 packs, not the 9 like should have been, no energy cards, no flipper coin and NO full art Eevee promo card

issues.description: 正版卡片被替換為其他遊戲的卡片（Lorcana、日文普通牌），欺詐性質極高
issues.representative_quote: Scam! Damaged box with resealed plastic. No sealed individual packs inside. All cards inside were loose and from several different series. There was also 3 random Japanese cards.

issues.description: 骰子、狀態標記等配件遺失
issues.representative_quote: Dice were missing, same with the condition markers.

issues.description: 第三方賣家以 $150-200+ 販售 MSRP $60 產品，買家在高溢價下更可能收到篡改品
issues.representative_quote: Way over priced. Not enough hits for the price Amazon is allowing the scalpers to resale this should be illegal honestly

issues.description: 外盒邊角受損
issues.representative_quote: It was not mint condition. The box itself was beat up on the corners especially.

cannot_solve_problem.label: 無法解決問題（功能失效）

issues.description: 多起已驗證購買者回報收到已開封、Box Topper 遭竊的箱子
issues.representative_quote: Don't buy, all packs were opened and valuable cards were taken.; Inner box arrives unsealed and tampered with.

issues.description: 由 36 包降為 30 包，無法支援 4 人 Draft，被認為是 WotC 漲價手段
issues.representative_quote: These are 30 packs instead of the typical 36. I'm assuming this is the new WotC money grab.

issues.description: 單箱 EV 普遍低於售價，多數買家開出的牌市值遠低於 $129.99
issues.representative_quote: Paid $250 for $110 worth of cards. I'd recommend just buying the singles for this set.

platform_fraud_risk.summary: Amazon TCG 品類存在系統性篡改/重新密封問題，即使 Amazon 直售（amzn-direct）亦不能免疫。Prismatic Evolutions ETB 的 45% 篡改率為本次分析中最嚴重案例，顯示退貨政策被惡意利用。

risk_levels.B0G2FVLXVL: medium（第三方賣家，加價但真實性尚可）
risk_levels.B0G3CY83L5: medium-high（Amazon 直售但 13% 篡改率）
risk_levels.B0DLPL7LC5: critical（Amazon 直售但 45% 篡改率，所有宣稱均被矛盾）
risk_levels.B0DNV3NV61: low-medium（篡改率 10%，非 Pokémon 品類，風險相對較低）

overall.name: Magic: The Gathering Aetherdrift Play Booster Box
overall.key_strength: 最高評分（4.65）、篡改率最低（10%）、配送最可靠
overall.key_weakness: EV 不佳（28% 回報虧損）、包數縮減（30 包）、主題爭議大

overall.name: Pokémon TCG: Mega Evolution—Ascended Heroes ETB
overall.key_strength: 開包體驗佳（78%）、Amazon 邀請制有效抑制黃牛、卡套設計精美
overall.key_weakness: 13% 篡改率、18% 外盒受損、定價偏高

overall.name: Pokémon TCG: Pokémon Day 2026 Collection
overall.key_strength: 產品真實性高（87%）、紀念幣受好評、限定版收藏價值
overall.key_weakness: 第三方賣家加價 116%、36% 外盒受損、應從 Target 購買而非 Amazon

overall.name: Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Prismatic Evolutions ETB
overall.key_strength: MSRP 正常售價、收藏品相佳（完整品）、拉到稀有牌時體驗極佳
overall.key_weakness: 【警告】45% 篡改率，不建議在 Amazon 購買，所有核心宣稱均遭矛盾

verdict.verdict_reason: 集換式卡牌（TCG）在 Amazon 平台上存在系統性篡改/重新密封問題。Prismatic Evolutions ETB 的 45% 篡改率為極嚴重的平台誠信危機，即使 Amazon 直售產品亦無法保障內容物完整性。整體類別面臨：(1) 篡改率從 10% 到 45% 的普遍性詐騙問題；(2) 第三方賣家黃牛加價；(3) 即使 Amazon 直售仍有顯著篡改風險。建議消費者從實體零售商（Target、GameStop）或直接從遊戲店購買，而非 Amazon。
verdict.report_type_rationale: 雖然 MTG Aetherdrift 和 Mega Evolution ETB 在部分買家手中仍能提供良好體驗，但 Prismatic Evolutions 的 45% 篡改率已構成 warning 門檻（功能失效率遠超 20%）。整體類別的平台篡改問題需要正式警告報告，提醒消費者規避 Amazon 購買 TCG 產品的系統性風險。
verdict.platform_recommendation: 建議優先從 Target、Walmart 實體店、GameStop 或官方合作遊戲店購買 TCG 產品。若必須在 Amazon 購買，僅選擇有邀請制的 Amazon 直售，並在收到時立即開箱驗貨。

key_findings: 【最嚴重】Prismatic Evolutions ETB（B0DLPL7LC5）在 Amazon 直售下仍有 45% 篡改率，35% 包裝被拆、稀有卡遭竊，8% 被替換為其他遊戲卡牌（Lorcana），構成極嚴重的平台誠信危機
TCG 篡改問題具系統性：Mega Evolution ETB（Amazon 直售）13%、MTG Aetherdrift（Amazon 直售）10%，顯示問題非個案
Amazon 退貨政策被惡意利用：買家開封抽走稀有卡後以「收到篡改品」理由退貨，退貨品重新上架繼續售出
Pokémon Day 2026 Collection（第三方賣家）雖加價 116%，但產品真實性反而最高（87% 正面），主要問題為物流外盒受損（36%）而非篡改
MTG Aetherdrift 為本次評分最高產品（4.65），篡改率相對最低，但 28% 買家回報 EV 不佳、包數縮減為 30（原 36）引發爭議
Amazon TCG 品類整體不建議購買：建議消費者選擇 Target、GameStop 等實體零售，或 Amazon 邀請制限量直售
review_needed_reasons: Prismatic Evolutions ETB 萃取結果自帶 [REVIEW_NEEDED] 標記（聲明驗證直接矛盾，觸發條件 4）
研究報告自評 MAJOR RESEARCH GAP，WebSearch/WebFetch 量不足，市場背景資料有限
篡改問題的根本原因（Amazon 退貨政策漏洞）需要平台層面的背景研究，現有資料未覆蓋
MTG（B0DNV3NV61）評論數僅 40 筆，信心度有限
